summary: Completed full v8.0 review (GISA Audit + International Localization v2.0 + Cultural Onboarding v2.0). All backend tests green (92 regression shield + 32 v8 unit + 13 new v8 API endpoint = 137 total passing). Frontend landing page renders all 11 required data-testids with exact copy matches; Globe FAB → Cultural Hub modal flow verified functional with all 3 tabs (country/language/dialect).

minor.issue: CF-IPCountry header is stripped by the K8s preview-env ingress, so Tier-1 auto-sync defaults to US on preview URL. Works correctly against localhost:8001 and via X-Country fallback header. In production (behind Cloudflare) this will work as designed. Not a code bug — infrastructure artifact of preview env.

action_items: (Optional) Document that Tier-1 CF-IPCountry auto-sync requires Cloudflare in front of the deployment — add a note or X-Country fallback instruction to the locked spec or an ops README so future QA does not flag this as a bug.

(Optional test-tooling polish) In future Playwright tests, click fixed-position FABs with native element.click() via page.evaluate() rather than Playwright's click+scroll_into_view to avoid scroll-induced mis-clicks. Functional behavior is correct.
critical_code_review_comments: GISA routes (/api/gisa/modules) return 'matrix' key while /api/gisa/thresholds returns 'thresholds' — naming is inconsistent but acceptable for beta. Both keys are stable per unit tests.
Cultural onboarding submit uses nested {step, payload} — field name 'payload' is generic; consider renaming to 'step_data' or 'form' in a future breaking-change release for clarity. Not blocking.

GlobeFAB positions at bottom-24 right-4 (y≈1022 on 1080 viewport) which is within 60px of viewport bottom. Visible/clickable, but a future mobile review should confirm it doesn't overlap with the mobile dock on small screens (code already has `sm:bottom-6` override).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_v8_api_endpoints.py (created — 13 new API-level integration tests against live backend URL)

success_rate.backend: 100% (137/137 passed — regression 92/92, v8 unit 32/32, v8 API 13/13)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (11/11 required data-testids present, tagline + final CTA copy exact-match, Globe FAB → Cultural Hub modal flow verified with all 3 tabs)

test_credentials: Not exercised — v8 endpoints are all public; admin God-Mode + demo login not required for any v8 feature tested. Credentials in /app/memory/test_credentials.md verified available.
seed_data_creation: Test-only docs created in user_metadata collection under user_id='TEST_v8_locale_user' and 'TEST_v8_cultural_user'. Safe to leave — no impact on prod data; TEST_ prefix makes cleanup trivial.
context_for_next_testing_agent: v8.0 feature batch (GISA, International v2, Cultural Onboarding v2) is fully green. 92-test regression shield still passes. If adding new features, reuse /app/backend/tests/test_v8_api_endpoints.py as the live-URL integration smoke layer for these three modules. Key schema gotchas to remember: (1) /api/localization/select + /me/{id}/save expect 'country_code' + 'language_code' + 'dialect' (NOT 'country'/'language'/'currency'); (2) /api/cultural-onboarding/{id}/submit expects {step, payload} (NOT {step, data}); (3) /api/localization/detect returns {'localization': {...}} nested under 'localization' key; (4) /api/gisa/modules returns {'matrix': [...]} not 'modules'. (5) CF-IPCountry header is stripped by the preview-env K8s ingress; use X-Country header fallback in tests. Globe FAB lives at bottom-right fixed position — in Playwright use page.evaluate("document.querySelector(...).click()") rather than playwright click() to avoid scroll interference.
